ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sunrise_sunset_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the locations table */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the timing data */,
  "dawn_time" TEXT /* Time of dawn */,
  "sunrise_time" TEXT /* Time of sunrise */,
  "sunset_time" TEXT /* Time of sunset */,
  "dusk_time" TEXT /* Time of dusk */,
  "daylight_duration" TEXT /* Total duration of daylight */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sunrise_sunset_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the location record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the location record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, public) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object to store role-specific permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the users table */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user_roles table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
column_names: Foreign key to the locations table
Timestamp for when the record was created
Timestamp for when the record was last updated
Timestamp for when the location record was created
Timestamp for when the location record was last updated
Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, public)
Timestamp for when the user account was created
Timestamp for when the user account was last updated
Timestamp for the user's last login
Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive)
JSON object to store role-specific permissions
Foreign key to the users table
Foreign key to the user_roles table
